AND DAILY AﾎｼOWANCE) REGULATIONS, 1997 No. NHAR-12011/19/95-Admn.-ln exercise of the powers conferred by section 35 read ﾂｷ with section 9 of the National Highways Authority of.India Act, 1988 (68 of 1988), the National ﾂｷ Highways Authority of India makes the following regulations regulating the entitlement of the travel.ling allowance and daily allowance of officers and employees of the Authority :- I. Short title, c011;mencementand application- (I) These regulations may be called theNational Highways Authority of India (TravellingAllowance and Daily Allowance) Regulations, 1997 (2} Gazette. They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official . " (3) Theyshall apply to all officers and employees inwhole time employment of the Authority. 2. Definitions. - In these regulations, unless the context otherwise requires, ' (aJ "competent authority" means the Chairman Gr a Member or any other officer authorised' as such by the Authority in this behalf . ' ﾂｷ (b) "family" includes the spouse residing with the officer or employee and (i) Parents; , 1 (ii) Grand Parents; (iii) dependent sons and daughters (including adqpted and step sons and daughters).' . (iv), brothers and sisters; of the officer or employee,'if they are residing with and are fully dependent on the officer or -cmployee, ' (c )' "headquarters", in relation to an officer or employee, means the city or town in which the officer or employee has been posted for the time being. (d) "officer or employee" means any person who is in whole time employment of the Authority. -- 12 of 18 -- ''IPT 111-? 4] (e) "pay" means the pay, special pay, dearness pay and any other emoluments classified as pay. 'ﾂｷ 47 (t) "temporarytransfer"; means transferﾂｷ of 'an officer or employee from the headquartersto any other place ﾂｷof duty for a period not ex?eeding.ninety days. ﾂｷ ' ﾂｷ (g) ' (h) "tour" means the journey undertaken by an officer or employee at places other than his-, headquarters on official duty and includes the journey performed to undergotraining or study sponsored by the Authority. . ﾂｷ . . ﾂｷ' ' "transfer" means transfer of an officer or employee frpm one headquarterto ﾂｷ anotherfor a period exceeding ninety days. 3. Entitlement of travelling allowance aud Haily allowance:- An officer or employee who-is on tour or on temporary transfer under the orders of the compeient autljority 'shallbe entitled to claim hotel tariff. daily allowance and travel!ing allowance. I 4 Hotel ti,riff:- (i) An officer or employee (excludingGroup "D" employees)of the rank specified in column (2) 'of the Table-I below shall be entitledto the teimburseme?tof actual hotel tariff (includingtaxes, if any) equivalent to the l?ritf leviable in the hotel . specified in the corresponding entry in column (3) of the said Table. ﾂｷ . , I Tf\BLE-J (ii) A Group 'D' employee of the Authority sball, in lieu of hotel tariff. be paid Rs.' 1501- per day. ﾂｷ ﾂｷ ' SI.No Designation, , Rates payable (single room) per day.: (I) (2) ' (3) '. I Chairman/Members . 5.-Star Hotel, ITDC or equivalent , ﾂｷ ,., . 1 General Managers .4-Star Hotel, IT_QCor equivalent 3 Dv. General Managers ' l窶｢Star, Hotel, ITDC Qr equivalentﾂｷ. . 4 ;,.1anagersS: other equivalent posts 2,StarHotel, ITDC or eauivalenr ,. 5 Assistant Manager/Accounr, Officer, Ashok Yatri Niwas ,or equivalent and other equivalent posts, 'including ' " Group 'C' empl(!Yees . (iii) An officer or ?mployee shall attach the original voucher from the 'hotel to his travelling allowance claim in support of the amount' claimed, but reimbursement of hotel ﾂｷ tariff shall, in no case, exceed the entitlement specified under subﾂｷregulations (i). -- 13 of 18 -- 48 THE GAZEITEOF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PARTHI-SEC. 4) 5. Daily Allowance:- (i) An officer or employee of the rank specified in column (2) of the. Table below, whee on tomﾂｷ or temporary transfer shall be entitled to a daily allowance for the period of his absencefrom headquarters exceeding twelve hours at the rates specifiedin the corresponding entry in column (3) of the said Table. Where the absence exceeds six hours but less than 12 hours,dailyallowance sh?llbe reduced to 50%. TABLE-II - SI.No. Designation Rates payable per day (I) (2) ' (3) 窶｢ 1 . General Managers Rs. 500/- e----2 . Dv General Managers Rs. 450/- ] Managers & other e<'iuivalent posts Rs 400/- 4. Assistant'Manager/Accounts Officer Rs. 350/- and other. equivalent posts, including ' Group 'C' emoloyees ' . S. Group 'D'. employees Rs. 75/- - ' Note : In the case of Chairman/Member,the boarding and lodging charges as per actual plus Rs. 100/- as incidentiai'charges shall be admissible. . , (ii) No daily allowanceis admissible uhder,sub-regulation(i) to an officer/employee on temporary transfer beyond thirty days.
